package. The panel keeps a small set of highly variable probe sets together with immunophenotype, molecular subtype, sex, and age variables for post hoc interpretation."> Skip to contents

Microarray-Derived Gene Panel from ALL

Source: R/data_real_examples.R
all_gene_panel.Rd

A compact omics table derived from the Bioconductor ALL experiment package. The panel keeps a small set of highly variable probe sets together with immunophenotype, molecular subtype, sex, and age variables for post hoc interpretation.

Usage

all_gene_panel

Format

A data frame with 128 rows and 13 variables:

sample_id

Sample identifier.

38355_at

Expression value.

36638_at

Expression value.

38514_at

Expression value.

41214_at

Expression value.

36108_at

Expression value.

39318_at

Expression value.

38096_f_at

Expression value.

38319_at

Expression value.

bt

Observed ALL immunophenotype.

mol_biol

Observed molecular subtype annotation.

sex

Observed sex.

age

Observed age.

age_band

Ordinal age band for interpretation.

Source

Derived from the Bioconductor experiment package ALL.

On this page
